positive: A stylized, whimsical composition featuring a group of interconnected woodland creatures (fox, owl, rabbit, bear cub) forming a balanced circular pattern. The style is modern folk illustration meets Nordic embroidery art, rendered with clean, defined lines and flat, contrasting color blocks. The animals are depicted in joyful, gentle poses surrounded by stylized botanical elements like mushrooms and fern leaves. The overall color palette is sage green, muted terracotta, deep navy, and cream, utilizing high contrast for silhouette definition. Composition must be centralized and repeatably usable for textile printing, with clean edges and strong graphic impact. Studio lighting, vector art quality.
negative: blur, smudge, dirty, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logos, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low detail, noise, photorealistic
